name: @gotong/example-memory-upgrade
description: MU capstone — the same butler memory, measured by the same ruler (MU-M1), gets progressively better as each MU milestone's REAL code layers in: M2 fusion reranks the focused fact to #1 (MRR up), M3 atomic-fact extraction closes the synonym gap (recall 0→1). Deterministic, no API key.
